consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Esswell International AB' from certificate corresponds exactly to invoice issuer 'ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB' including address and country Sweden after normalization (case, business form). Normalization of 'AB' and address format applied. No contradictions found. Matches rule 4.1.0 and 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6 and land match per 4.1.4.

consignee.motivation: Consignee in certificate is 'PICFARE INDUSTRIES LIMITED' located in Kampala, Uganda. In invoice, consignee equivalent fields (Customer/Applicant) are 'Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE', Jebel Ali, Dubai, UAE. The names differ significantly, addresses differ and countries (Uganda vs UAE) do not match, constituting MISMATCH per 4.2.0.1 and land check 4.2.3.

goods_description.motivation: Goods descriptions in certificate match those in invoice after normalization: 'NEWSPRINT PAPER 52 GSM 66 CM' and 'Bulky Newsprint 52 gsm 66 cm', and similarly for 99 CM variant. Terms align sufficiently without semantic interpretation. Article numbers not specified so text matching applied per rules 4.3.2 and 4.3.3.

38.402 mt / 156 reels

quantity.motivation: Total quantities and units in certificate (38.402 MT, 97.460 MT, 420 ROLLS) can be identified in invoice quantities for the same products with matching numeric values and units after normalization, including allowance for numeric formatting. The total mass matches sum per invoice and roll counts correspond. No contradictory quantity found.

origin.motivation: Country of origin 'CANADA' as stated in certificate is explicitly found in invoice text under 'Country of Origin' field with exact match after normalization. No conflicting origin found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Consignor, goods description, quantity and origin match between certificate and invoice. Consignee differs in name and country between the two documents, causing NOT_IDENTICAL overall result.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Mottagaren i certifikatet är PICFARE INDUSTRIES LIMITED i Uganda medan fakturan är ställd till Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE i Förenade Arabemiraten. Övriga uppgifter som avsändare, varubeskrivning, mängd och ursprungsland stämmer överens. På grund av mottagarskillnaden krävs manuell granskning.
